reviews.comment:
No tienen impreso un QR para acercarlo hasta la ventanilla de auto para poder pagar con la app, tenés que bajar del auto para poder escanear el código. En otras YPF sí lo tienen impreso; es una cortesía.

(Translated by Google)
They don't have a QR code printed on them to scan at the car window to pay with the app; you have to get out of the car to scan the code. Other YPF stations do have it printed; it's a courtesy.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHci02NkZnEAE
